## Evidence

- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<short-kebab-description>`.
- [ ] This PR represents one complete goal and contains separate logical slice
      commits; it is not a per-slice PR.
- [ ] The full local or slice gate passed.
- [ ] Unit tests cover changed logic.
- [ ] Integration tests cover changed boundaries.
- [ ] E2E tests cover changed user-critical paths.
- [ ] Responsive, accessibility, loading, and error behavior were reviewed when
      applicable.
- [ ] Screenshots, traces, or request evidence are attached when useful.
- [ ] Required manual UAT or DEV/QA results are recorded in
      `docs/testing/manual/`, or manual verification is not applicable.

Commands and results:

```text
<commands and concise results>
```

- GitHub Actions status:
- Human review: required before merge
